vision: A distraction-free mobile application that helps individuals efficiently manage their daily tasks and stay organised.

epics.name: Task Creation and Management
epics.description: Core functionality enabling users to create, complete, and delete tasks to manage their daily responsibilities

stories.title: Create a new task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture my responsibilities quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title Then a new task is created and displayed in my list
Given I am creating a new task When I submit without entering a title Then I see an error message requiring a title

stories.title: Add due date to a task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to set a due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap the due date field Then I can select a date from a date picker
Given I am creating a task When I set a due date Then the due date is displayed alongside the task in my list
stories.notes: Due date is optional for task creation

stories.title: Mark a task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and see what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I tap the completion checkbox Then the task is marked as complete with visual indication
Given I have a completed task When I tap the completion checkbox again Then the task is marked as incomplete

stories.title: Delete a task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I swipe or tap delete on the task Then I am prompted to confirm deletion
Given I confirm task deletion When the action completes Then the task is permanently removed from my list

epics.name: Task Viewing and Filtering
epics.description: Functionality for users to view their tasks and filter them by completion status for better organisation

stories.title: View all tasks in list format
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks saved When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a scrollable list
Given I have no tasks saved When I open the app Then I see an empty state with guidance to add my first task

stories.title: Filter tasks by completion status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter tasks by complete or incomplete status, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing my task list When I select the complete filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I have a filter applied When I select show all Then all tasks are displayed regardless of status

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Local storage functionality ensuring user tasks are saved and available across app sessions

stories.title: Persist tasks locally on device
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved on my device, so that I do not lose them when I close the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my tasks are still available
Given I mark a task complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - essential for usable app

stories.title: Support offline task operations
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to manage my tasks without internet connection, so that I can use the app anywhere
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no internet connection When I create, complete, or delete tasks Then all operations work normally
Given I am offline When I view my task list Then all previously saved tasks are accessible
stories.notes: All data is local so offline is inherent to architecture

epics.name: Cross-Platform Support
epics.description: Ensuring the application works seamlessly on both iOS and Android mobile platforms

stories.title: Run app on iOS devices
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my iPhone or iPad, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred Apple device
acceptance_criteria: Given I am using an iOS device When I install the app Then it runs without errors on iOS 14 or later
Given I am using an iOS device When I interact with the app Then UI elements follow iOS design conventions

stories.title: Run app on Android devices
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my Android phone or tablet, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred Android device
acceptance_criteria: Given I am using an Android device When I install the app Then it runs without errors on Android 10 or later
Given I am using an Android device When I interact with the app Then UI elements follow Material Design conventions

epics.name: User Experience Enhancements
epics.description: Additional features to improve usability and provide a polished user experience

stories.title: Display overdue tasks with visual indicator
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see which tasks are overdue, so that I can prioritise tasks that have passed their due date
acceptance_criteria: Given a task has a due date in the past When I view the task list Then overdue tasks are visually highlighted
Given an overdue task is completed When I view the task Then the overdue indicator is removed
stories.notes: Visual enhancement for due date feature

stories.title: Sort tasks by due date
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to sort my tasks by due date, so that I can see which tasks need attention first
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks with due dates When I select sort by due date Then tasks are ordered with soonest due dates first
Given I have tasks without due dates When sorting by due date Then tasks without dates appear at the end of the list

stories.title: Edit existing task details
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to edit a task's title and due date, so that I can update task information as circumstances change
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task When I tap on the task Then I can edit the title and due date fields
Given I am editing a task When I save changes Then the updated information is displayed in my task list

stories.title: Add optional notes to tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add notes to a task, so that I can include additional details or context
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing a task When I enter text in the notes field Then the notes are saved with the task
Given a task has notes When I view the task details Then the notes are displayed
